summary: Complete the unfinished runtime/source/provider decoupling from the prior source-decoupling goal and harden the gates that missed the violations.
rationale: The previous source-decoupling goal left concrete CTS/Liepin runtime execution paths and verification blind spots. This corrective goal requires red-green gate hardening, full WorkflowRuntime fixture-source proof, registry-driven runtime execution, and repaired Tach boundaries.
hard_acceptance: runtime does not import concrete seektalent.sources.cts or seektalent.sources.liepin implementation modules
runtime does not import seektalent.source_adapters implementation modules
neutral source contracts and registry are split from concrete source adapters
runtime does not contain CTS/Liepin source whitelists or concrete source execution branches
fixture_source executes through a full WorkflowRuntime round path without runtime code changes
source boundary checker catches the original missed violations
tach.toml does not permit runtime/sources/providers cycles
existing CTS and Liepin behavior remains covered and passing
verification: uv run pytest tests/test_source_boundaries.py tests/test_source_registry_contract.py tests/test_runtime_source_adapter_boundary.py tests/test_runtime_multi_source_round_dispatch.py tests/test_runtime_source_lanes.py -q
uv run ruff check src tests experiments
uv run ty check src tests
risks: The current source-boundary checker is expected to pass before correction despite real violations; the first implementation phase must make that checker fail on the current code with concrete import, branch/dispatch, budget/detail/reason, and Tach-cycle messages.
The existing fixture source tests are expected to pass before correction because they bypass WorkflowRuntime; the corrective fixture test must cover the full runtime path.
Tach currently validates a cyclic dependency model; the correction must repair the model rather than baseline it.
If the fixed source_contracts/source_adapters package split conflicts with existing code, the Goal worker must escalate instead of inventing another package structure silently.
